title: halimium alyssoides var. rugosum
intro: Halimium alyssoides var. rugosum, also known as rough-leaved rockrose, is a plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and skin conditions. The plant's extracts are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as wound healing and anti-aging. Halimium alyssoides var. rugosum is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
